name: XRWorkout Free to Play VR Fitness Sport

reviews.review_description: This game is good👍 The only thing I don’t like is how high the “jump” is.

developer_response.body:
We are really glad that you like it.
You can cheat a bit with the jumps if you don't stand tall during calibration because they are relative to your height.
I wouldn't go down too much but a little would already help, and you don't need to look through the head triangles, it's totally OK if you only touch them with the top of your head

reviews.review_description: Finally, a free option that actually lets me play & use the workouts to find out whether or not this is app for me. free 10 minutes a day pretty awesome!
i really enjoyed the preview to the app but i do need to do a full workout to give a true review.
Good and I'm disabled still doing it
NGL kinda boring but i still do it

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback.
Have you given the foot tracking a try as well?

reviews.review_description:
Ydayfhgg
ttcusumhr
Really good game.I like it.

I'm have been doing the free 8 minute routines for a few days and its fun.  However I have to agree with the other reviews of complicated and confusing menus.

I also cannot figure out how to exit the app.  Pressing the meta buttons merely reposition the XR menus.

I also have bad knees and cannot do deep squats. How can i configure the game so it stops asking me to squat.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback, we are happy that you like the daily free workouts.

To answer your questions. 

When you pull up the Meta Home menu ( if you look at your right palm and pinch your thumb and index finger together ) you should see a stop button in the page that comes up.

As for the squats, usually the easiest way is to make yourself a custom workout in the main menu but that is a pro feature.
Just create a multiplayer room and you have access to the pro features.
Then select only the exercises you want in the custom exercise screen.

If you need any help just hop into our discord at https://chat.vrworkout.at or join the facebook group we are there to help.

developer_response.body:
Have you hosted a multiplayer room?
Any time limit is removed while you host a room, you can do that as often and as long as you want.
And you can access more of the pro content while you host as well.

This is to reward players that give back to the community.

reviews.review_description:
A nice variety of workout routines. The weekly challenges are fun and custom workouts are a must have.

Keep up the great work, and don't listen to haters. Their opinions often have nothing to do with the app itself.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind words. 

This really means a lot to us and is exactly what motivates us to continue making it better.

reviews.review_description:
I really do like this app but times when it glitches and doesn’t pick up my hands. Some days I’ve had to stop it and play with the remotes, which is 
inconvenient. All in all, it’s a pretty solid workout app and interesting enough that it keeps me coming back. It’s just frustrating when you’re so competitive and you know you did better than your score shows. C’est la vie.
This game is not just a fun workout but also a real one.it has hand tracking,costume workout and tracking on how well you did and it’s all free so better download it trust me.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, we could not have said it any better.

Will we see you on the weekly challenge leaderboard?

reviews.review_description: I have been trying out the free eight minute exercise routine and I absolutely love it. However, today it gave me about a minute of a workout, and then it asked me to stand, and that was it. I thought it was a way to manipulate me to sign up to try the pro version. So I said yes, and it released some pro choices, but when I went into the eight minute workout, it did the exact same thing. Please help me to resolve this

developer_response.body:
Hi Kiki,

we aren't able to reach you directly. We are wondering if everything is back to normal for you again?

Cheers
Michael


---
Old messages

Thank you, looking into it right away

It's definitely not a way to get you to sign up but it must be a bug.

Update 11:39PM:
We can confirm that this is a bug. We just rolled back to the previous version until it is fixed.
You may have to reinstall it if it does not roll back automatically

Update 12:19AM:
Should be fixed now, you can update to the latest version

If there are still issues please reach out to us in the discord
https://chat.vrworkout.at

reviews.review_description: Good
Not bad for free.
jyg
it works
Ggffff

You can do a 8 minute exercise that is exactly the same every single day. BORING! anything different you have to pay for $.99/day which is close to $361 for the year. Sure you can get it cheaper if you give them all your money at once but who knows whether the other activities are good or not.

developer_response.body:
The free exercises and music are always new when you restart the app and every time you start any workout you get something different.

You can do that forever without paying, you should only upgarde to Pro once you have outgrown the free workouts

You can also just host a multiplayer room to get more Pro features for free. As long as you are hosting you will have no time limit and you have access to the custom exercises.

You can also use the 14 day free trial if you need more of the pro features to decide.

You should also check the Public Workouts from the left menu which are many workouts created by users. Anything that fits in your daily workout budget can be played with the free version as well.
